scope: Authored Eevee surface reconstruction on the exact GN-VM mesh.

capture.environmentInterpretation: Blender world strength and Three.js PMREM intensity are renderer-specific units. The recorded browser intensity aligns mean surface exposure while preserving the same studio.exr orientation.

recoveredGraph.baseColor: The first HSV node clamps its negative Value branch to black; the downstream HSV node reads that black branch through Reroute, so both Mix colors and the final Base Color are exactly black.
recoveredGraph.roughness: NodeGroup.015 remaps the black Base Color from [0,1] to [0.3687744140625,191.3863525390625]; the linked Principled Roughness resolves to 0.3687744140625.

interpretation: The browser no longer falls back to a gray diagnostic material: it renders the supplied attribute-free N03D mahogany graph on the exact dowel topology. Mean exposure is aligned within 0.00042 luminance and the silhouette is near-identical. Eevee and Three.js place the very dark coat and bump reflections in different screen regions, so spatial luminance correlation remains a renderer residual rather than a claim of pixel identity.
